programme.title: Are We There Yet?

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Kat learns that Charmaine threw her personal items in the trash. Don takes a paternity test hoping to squash the rumors that he fathered a love child. Van is released from boot camp but rising tensions put a damper on his homecoming. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Don's paternity test results send him on a downward spiral. Van has an emotional reunion with his daughter after being separated from her. Danielle's birthday celebration turns into chaos when Ashley and her friends attack Charmaine. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Charmaine faces the consequences of quitting her corporate job and following her dreams. Ashley confronts Don about fathering a child with another woman. Tempers flare when Ryan introduces yet another new tattoo artist in the shop. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: The crew heads to New Orleans for some Bourbon Street debauchery. Charmaine's family demands that she moves back home when they find out she's broke. Don is caught off guard when his baby mama Whitney ambushes him at 9 Mag. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Don brings his two baby mamas together in hopes of uniting his family. Ryan celebrates his 30th birthday with a Great Gatsby themed bash. And Danielle's boyfriend Terrence makes a fool of himself when his jealousy gets the best of him. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Don receives some life-shattering news. Charmaine auditions to be a radio DJ. Phor heads into the studio with one of hip hop's top rappers to record a song. Ryan is forced to make a tough decision about Cobra's future at 9 Mag. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Kat hosts her first art show, but Phor shows up with the woman he cheated on Kat with. Van confesses to his girl that he's not a one-woman kind of guy. Phor's girlfriend Nikki confronts Kat about her attitude —and things get physical. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: The 9 Mag crew heads to the Dominican Republic for Don's wedding. Kat confronts Phor about cheating on her. Van's threesome goes wrong when his girlfriend brings a guest. Don gets too friendly with a stripper, jeopardizing his wedding. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Ashley enlists her brother to spy on Don's bachelor party. Terrence gives Danielle an ultimatum—him or 9 Mag. And Ashley threatens to call off the wedding when she sees scandalous photos of Don at his bachelor party. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles
programme.desc: The sit-down between KP and Lemeir brings about a revelation that catches Ceaser by surprise and leads to new alliances within the Crew. Star and Tim try to ease the minds of team IAM as a deadline is set to recommit to the shop.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles
programme.desc: As the day of reckoning dawns, KP, Tim, Star and Cory are surprised by who shows up at the IAM shop willing to work...and who doesn't. Vudu meets with her biological father for the first time since childhood and is unsure she wants to hear the truth.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles
programme.desc: After receiving shocking news regarding the legality of their shop, KP and Tim seek help from KP's dad. Lemeir debuts his new food truck venture and shares concern with Barbie about his fractured relationship with Nessie.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles
programme.desc: Bad news abounds as KP and Tim find out the shop failed its health inspection, while Nessie and Barbie learn that Lemeir was in a bad accident. Vudu continues to bond with her father by giving him his first tattoo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Placer culpable
programme.desc: La muerte de un oficial de la Marina lleva a Gibbs y al equipo al mundo de las prostitutas de lujo, confiando en la madame Holly Snow para que les ayude a atrapar a un asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Doble trabajo
programme.desc: Cuando el trabajo nocturno de un especialista en polígrafos del NCIS toma un giro peligroso, Gibbs, Fornell y el equipo tienen que descubrir la verdad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Obsesión
programme.desc: DiNozzo se siente cada vez más cautivado por una mujer a la que no conoce mientras investiga el asesinato de su hermano.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Zona fronteriza
programme.desc: El equipo intenta localizar a un asesino en serie, mientras Abby se dirige al sur de la frontera para dar un discurso con McGee a cuestas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Historias de amor
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan cuando un propietario dispara a un intruso, solo para descubrir que el intruso es un sicario. Además, un joven abogado intenta hacer justicia para su madre, a quien Erin envió a prisión por un cargo de asesinato hace 12 años.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La puerta de los pobres
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un residente de bajos ingresos en un edificio de lujo con unidades asequibles. Frank se enfrenta a un problema con un detective amigo de Gormley que abusa de su posición.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Jugadores energéticos
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave se retira, Erin debe traer a un informante protegido de la mafia a Nueva York y mantenerlo a salvo con ayuda de Danny y Maria. Frank mantiene tensas negociaciones con el alcalde Poole.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Sin salida
programme.desc: Un hombre emocionalmente perturbado retiene a Maria como rehén a punta de pistola en una sala de interrogatorios. Danny debe cumplir sus demandas para protegerla. Mientras, Frank enfrenta un dilema personal y moral.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El UAC es convocado a Wisconsin en busca de un asesino serial, el equipo busca una conexión entre las víctimas para encontrar pistas del sospechoso. Además, Kate tiene dificultades para lidiar con su sobrina, Meg, cuando comienza a comportarse mal.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la esposa de un prometedor congresista desaparece, la UAC investiga a sus enemigos políticos como posibles sospechosos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de Maryland aparece asesinada en la mesa de su comedor, el equipo localiza a otros familiares y amigos para descubrir secretos de su pasado, esperando averiguar que puedo haberlo llevado a ello y encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Placer culpable
programme.desc: La muerte de un oficial de la Marina lleva a Gibbs y al equipo al mundo de las prostitutas de lujo, confiando en la madame Holly Snow para que les ayude a atrapar a un asesino.

programme.desc: Cuando el trabajo nocturno de un especialista en polígrafos del NCIS toma un giro peligroso, Gibbs, Fornell y el equipo tienen que descubrir la verdad.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An underaged spring breaker is caught with a 'blackout rage gallon' and issued a ticket. A zero-tolerance policy of no alcohol or glass containers on the beach is enforced in Pinellas County.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter dancing tourists on the Vegas Strip. An uncooperative spring breaker finds herself in cuffs. Surfers and lifeguards rescue swimmers from a riptide. A beachgoer lies about his age.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teen holding a beer walks up to a Deputy. A jet skier violates a no wake zone. Deputies cut a tangled bird free. A minor discards his can of alcohol and tells Deputies his mom will pay his citation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a knife resists as a hotel clerk cheers on Officers. A man protests the legality of a stop but finally admits why he argued with Officers. A passenger becomes emotional when meth is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A domestic call turns chaotic when a male suspect resists and his girlfriend interferes with his arrest. A truck with detachable red and blue lights is located during a call of a police impersonator.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers use a police SUV and a taser to stop a fleeing man with a knife. A hit-and-run suspect crashes into a gas station. An unlicensed driver has warrants in Greene County, Missouri.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect leads Officers on a car chase before running from a K9. A PIT maneuver is used to end a stolen vehicle pursuit. A man claims he has crazy eyes when a Deputy suspects him of driving high.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man flees from Deputies with the hood up on a pickup truck. A suspect bails from a stolen truck and pretends he wasn't driving. A drunk driver is caught after a hit-and-run at a dance hall.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist gives up after leading Fontana Officers on a wild pursuit. A K9 is used to track a felony shoplifting suspect who fled a traffic stop. A Stop Stick is used to end a chase in Missouri.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen TV hangs out of a van during a slow-speed pursuit. A woman bites her boyfriend during an argument in Florida. A man claims he received a stolen car from a relative.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female driving a stolen car spins out and runs from Officers in Missouri. A burglary in progress leads Officers to a suspect breaking windows at a church. An altered tag is discovered to be stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gives Officers a fake name when he's stopped on a bike with no lights. Officers initiate a high-risk traffic stop on a reckless driver. A man is caught walking in traffic on the Vegas Strip.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A lengthy pursuit in Independence, MO goes off-road. Deputies chase a motorcyclist who claims he ran because he doesn't have a motorcycle endorsement. A man ingests fentanyl during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman rams a police car and begs Officers to take care of her dog. A man tells Officers he was just a passenger in a stolen Honda. A woman crashes her bicycle while trying to elude Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is tased twice after a car chase. His passenger resists and is also tased. A driver refuses to exit his truck in Florida. A woman claims the pills in her purse belong to her sister.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a bike refuses to stop and tries to hide a drug-filled backpack. A motorcyclist's attempt to flee is foiled by a big rig blocking the road. Meth is found in a center console during a stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female shoplifter flees in a stolen box truck and crashes into a retaining wall. A green Honda runs in Wichita. A female passenger in Florida admits to hiding drugs and a pipe in her intimate area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect makes a video call during a pursuit to apologize for relapsing. A burglar runs in circles in a vain attempt to elude Officers. A Sergeant finds a magnetic box full of meth and a hidden gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The driver of a car with a loud exhaust admits he panicked and ran. A woman caught riding a stolen moped claims she borrowed it. A man is caught with a tool for deactivating security tags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver speeds off when asked to step out of his truck. Deputies learn a man with a warrant for fentanyl is hiding in a backyard. A suspect steals a portable speaker after threatening an employee.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect with an ATF warrant runs from a traffic stop and gets tased. Drones help locate stolen motorcycles in Fort Wayne. A suspect leaves behind soggy footprints when he bails from a stolen car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver claims he was looking for companionship. A man admits to picking up a scantily clad lady and offering her $100 for her services. A man caught with meth claims he was set up by a girl.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect questions whether Officers are 'the real police'. A fleeing suspect parks at an elementary school and makes excuses. A husband's 'final answer' sends his wife to jail for meth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Spike strips are used to deflate the tires of a stolen box truck. Pounds of meth and a tossed gun are recovered after a pursuit. A prior felon caught with a gun and cocaine claims he was being chased.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen Dodge Ram 1500 crashes and knocks the power out. A woman caught huffing canned air in a stolen car keeps changing her story. A FLIR-equipped helicopter is used to catch fleeing juveniles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A handcuffed passenger surprises Officers by running from a traffic stop. A fleeing SUV runs out of gas shortly after a pursuit is terminated. A man claims guns were planted in his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a car wanted in connection to a shooting. Stop Sticks end a chase involving a dually truck. Deputies help a suspect with a warrant by gathering his laundry before heading to jail.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team discovers a deceased rancher was also a ballistics expert, they have to work with the FBI to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the body of a naked dead man is discovered by Dr. Robbins' wife in their master bedroom, it leads to a lot of questions for the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Willows works with the FBI again after a professional hit occurs at a law firm she's recommended to her friend.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team says goodbye to Catherine Willows as she makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Cuidado con el amor

programme.title: El cuerpo del delito

programme.title: El señor de la guerra
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage, ganador de un Oscar®, protagoniza esta historia tensa y llena de acción sobre un famoso traficante de armas que vendió armas a dictadores y consiguió eludir la ley durante casi veinte años.

programme.title: En defensa del honor
programme.desc: Bruce Willis interpreta a un oficial encarcelado que se niega a abandonar su lucha contra los nazis, incluso desde detrás de las líneas de los enemigos.

programme.desc: Cinco años después del baño de sangre en Camp Crystal, todo lo que queda es la leyenda de Jason y su madre demente, que había asesinado a siete consejeros del campamento.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte 3
programme.desc: Ignorando el sangriento legado de Camp Crystal Lake, uno por uno son víctimas del maníaco Jason que los acecha a cada paso ...

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte V: un nuevo comienzo
programme.desc: Esta vez parece haber puesto la mira en los pacientes jóvenes de una casa aislada. Y más de unos pocos de sus objetivos adolescentes terminan por la mitad, en cuartos ... lo que sea, Jason lo hace.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VII: la nueva sangre
programme.desc: Desde que el maníaco homicida Jason Voorhees quedó atrapado en cadenas en el fondo de Crystal Lake, el campamento de verano cercano ha funcionado sin problemas ... sin asesinato.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VIII: Jason invade Manhattan
programme.desc: La Gran Manzana está en grandes problemas, ya que el indestructible psicópata Jason Voorhees sale a la ciudad de Nueva York y pinta la ciudad de "rojo".

programme.title: Chucky el muñeco diabólico
programme.desc: El joven Andy es el único que sabe que su muñeco, Chucky, está poseído por el alma de un asesino y que ha cometido varios crímenes macabros. Pero el verdadero terror empieza cuando Chucky decide transferir su espíritu maligno a un humano... Andy.

programme.title: La maldición
programme.desc: En este thriller apasionante y sobrenatural con las estrellas más populares de Hollywood, un temor del estudio crece hasta convertirse en una vertiginosa pesadilla para un profesor y tres sujetos atrapados en una mansión misteriosa.

programme.title: The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Katharine Hepburn garnered an Oscar nomination as the "plain yet magnetically beautiful" tomboy rancher, with Burt Lancaster brilliantly cast in the role of the smooth-talking con man.

programme.title: Sabata
programme.desc: Get ready for fast-paced, explosive action as Lee Van Cleef stars as Sabata, the mysterious, steely-eyed gunslinger who, after he discovers the masterminds behind an elaborate bank heist, imposes his bullet-laced brand of justice on a guilty town.

programme.title: Adios, Sabata
programme.desc: Under the brutal rule of garrison leader Col. Skimmel, a group of Mexican revolutionaries hire gunslinger Sabata (Yul Brynner) to rob a transport of gold in order to buy weapons. But the Colonel has other plans...taking the gold for himself.

programme.title: Return of Sabata
programme.desc: The great Lee Van Cleef ('Death Rides a Horse') returns as the famous freewheeling gunslinger Sabata. In this third and final go-round for the enigmatic sharpshooter, Sabata seeks revenge when a band of desperadoes bilks him out of $5,000.

programme.title: The Broken Star
programme.desc: A marshal murders a rancher for gold, but is foiled by his assistant.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: The Desperate Hours
programme.desc: Bogart plays an escaped con who has nothing to lose. March is a suburban Everyman who has everything to lose - his family is held hostage by Bogart.

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: Birdman of Alcatraz
programme.desc: Burt Lancaster stars in the true story of killer Robert Stroud, who spent 43 years in solitary confinement at Alcatraz, and who educated himself, becoming a world renowned authority on birds. Thelma Ritter, Telly Savalas and Karl Malden co-star.

programme.title: The Train
programme.desc: Screen greats Burt Lancaster, Paul Scofield and Jeanne Moreau star in this suspense-laden tale of justice and retribution as a French Resistance fighter (Lancaster) attempts to stop a Nazi commander from looting the art treasures of Paris.

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate
programme.desc: Frank Sinatra, Laurence Harvey, Janet Leigh, and Angela Lansbury headline an all-star cast in this daring thriller rife with political intrigue, mental manipulation, and a diabolical plot that may lead to the highest levels of the government.

programme.title: Come Blow Your Horn
programme.desc: A free-swinging playboy introduces his hero-worshipping younger brother to the delights of high living in this adaption of Neil Simon's Broadway comedy about a Jewish family in New York City.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar's bowling team, the "Bon Vivants," battle the "Kingpins" for the championship in a game which marks the first time in five years the Bon Vivantshave a chance to win.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie each have dates the same night. Due to a mix up in names, Mike picks up Robbie's young date (Trudi Ames), and Robbie picks up an older woman (Carole Costello), meant for Mike.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Four attractive flight attendants move into the Pearson's house, and while Bub and the boys befriend them right away, Steve is annoyed by all the noise from a party for their pilot friends.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Bub wants to do something different than dishes and dusting. He goes on interviews for different jobs.

programme.title: My Three Sons

programme.desc: On Today's MAURY… The time for lying is over and the truth will be revealed. Who's right and who's about to get caught red handed! It's wild tales of cheating lovers forced to face the lie detector results on today's MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: It's more stories of paternity mysteries, mad moms and denying dads. These women are desperate for the paternity search to end. But after the results are revealed, will they be jumping for joy? Or will they have to start their search all over again?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Melissa swears that her mother Jessica is engaged to a serial cheater named Lee, but he says they're lying. Then, is Amber's fiancé Robby sleeping with other women…including her friend's mom? We'll find out on today's MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These denying dads swear there's no way they're the father! These moms need to prove them wrong. The only thing that's missing is the truth! DNA results don't lie, but after the results are read, who will be left looking for more answers?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Shantice is worried sick that her husband is cheating on her with prostitutes. Could Heather's fiancé have impregnated another woman? Plus, Karlissa's world may shatter when she finds out if her man cheated on her with her best friend.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Shocking stories of accused cheaters put to the test! Shantice thinks her husband is cheating on her with prostitutes. Did Heather's fiancé impregnate another woman? Karlissa's world may shatter when she hears if her man cheated with her best friend.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Jahaza believes that her fiancé Rafiq is cheating on her with the babysitter! Nikema is married to a motivational speaker named Drew. Is he motivating other women into his bed? Plus, Kim and Aaron are back…but this time she's got a secret to reveal!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Last time Lissett was on the show, she proved to her man Orlando that she was not a cheater. This time Lissett's sister has something crazy to confess! Then, Dretta's convinced that James is plowing more than other women's driveways.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Brenda and her man Aaron return after proving that Aaron was a cheater! Now they're here to prove that Aaron didn't father Tammie's baby. Then, Cat will test her boyfriend Tim and his brother Don to find out who her child's father is!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kayla and Bruce took a home DNA test that said Bruce was not the father of her baby, but she refuses to believe that test, so they'll settle it today! Chaundra and Holly suspect Christian the father of their 4 kids! Did Rikki cheat on his wife twice?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Tu'Shaun cheat on Nette with her sisters? Sister Bobbie has a shocking confession that could threaten both Nette's relationship with her man and both of her sisters! Then, triplet Alisha fears that her husband is sleeping with her 2 sisters!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Last time they were on MAURY, Leslie proved that Daniel was her baby's father. Now they're back to deny that Daniel fathered his ex-girlfriend Dina's son. Then, Glenn denies that he's the feather of his ex's daughter and his own wife's son!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The lie detector results are in and the truth is coming out! These guests say their loved ones are cheating behind their backs. But who cheated? How many times? And can they handle the results? All will be revealed on the today's explosive MAURY.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Da'Shan is here with his new girl Tyrekia to prove that he's not the father of Ashley's baby! Ashley is 1000% positive that Da'Shan is the father and is here to prove it once and for all. But what will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Por lo general, es fácil determinar cómo un criminal entró en la escena del crimen. Pero en este caso, estaba lejos de esclarecerse. Parecía que el asesino se desvaneció y quizá lo hizo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una Bolsa de Evidencia
programme.desc: Se investiga el asesinato de Jessica Knott, de 9 años. Los investigadores usan una bolsa de basura para conectar al sospechoso James Edward Crow, Jr. con el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las cámaras de seguridad en un casino rastrearon los movimientos de una joven poco antes de que desapareciera. Nunca se le volvió a ver, pero a través de la evidencia que dejó, pudo decírsele a los investigadores qué le sucedió y quién fue el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2007, Shamaia Smith desaparece de un club de striptease en East Hartford, Connecticut. La policía considera varios patrones del club, pero se enfocan en un comerciante local, Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Poco después del amanecer, se inicia un incendio en un contenedor de basura en Vancouver. Nadie ve al pirómano ni el fuego, que arde durante horas en el estacionamiento desolado. Pero hay más que basura en este contenedor en llamas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En un tranquilo pueblo de Gran Bretaña, un granjero se encuentra con una apariencia escalofriante. Empalado en el poste de la cerca hay una cabeza de cordero cortada y una nota que dice: Usted es el próximo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery fue brutalmente asesinada en su negocio de Illinois. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto fue un robo que salió mal o un asesinato premeditado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Paintball
programme.desc: En 1962, la gente de la pequeña ciudad de Hanford, California, perdió la sensación de paz cuando una de las vecinas, Marlene Miller, de 15 años, fue asesinada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Vestido para Matar
programme.desc: Se sospecha del padre de una niña cuando ella es asesinada, pero años después la policía se entera que un asesino condenado vivía cerca. Pequeñas gotas de sangre ayudan a la policía a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Usando técnicas que vio en programas de televisión de ciencia forense, una madre determina quién fue el responsable del accidente que hirió permanentemente a su hija de 4 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un barco camaronero de dos hombres se hundió cuando una violenta tormenta de rápido movimiento azotó la costa de Luisiana. El capitán se ahogó y el marinero fue rescatado catorce horas después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre una estudiante universitaria desaparecida lleva a la policía a descubrir que, sin que sus amigos lo supieran, vivía una extraña doble vida, asistía a la escuela de día y trabajaba como prostituta de noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, cuando un grupo fundamentalista comienza a robar bancos cerca de Spokane, las autoridades saben de inmediato que están tratando con criminales con experiencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, más de una docena de niños en Seattle, Washington, luchaban por sus vidas. Cada uno de ellos había contraído una enfermedad grave desconocida. Después de que uno murió, los investigadores sabían que el reloj estaba corriendo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un cirujano es apuñalado hasta la muerte y el sospechoso más probable es visto en un restaurante al momento del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Enamorado mortal
programme.desc: Un obstetra regresó a casa del hospital y encontró a su esposa en el piso del baño. Estaba cubierta de sangre y no respiraba.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía sospecha del Dr. John Jack Boyle en la desaparición de su esposa, Noreen, cuando firma los papeles de la hipoteca de una nueva casa con una mujer que se hace pasar por su esposa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, una agencia federal dictaminó que Terri Strickland había provocado intencionalmente el fuego que mató a su hijo de 17 meses, Josh Hinson.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, Christina Sanoubane fue asesinada en su departamento de Cedar Rapids después de dejar a su abusivo novio. Hay pistas en la escena: huellas sangrientas y ADN del kit de violación de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1969, la operadora telefónica de 25 años, Diane Maxwell, es violada y asesinada. Su hermano prometió que averiguaría quién fue el responsable y llevaría al asesino ante la justicia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mundo es un escenario
programme.desc: La policía es enviada a la escena de un tiroteo y descubren que el esposo de la víctima es uno de los suyos: un detective de homicidios que dice que su esposa se disparó accidentalmente en la cabeza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un incendio sospechoso arrasó un apartamento y mató a dos mujeres jóvenes. La causa del incendio y la identidad de las víctimas no estaban claras.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kellie Pickler comes to a rehearsal to share her experience and motivate the girls as Training Camp is coming to an end. Melissa Rycroft makes Kelsey aware of a big mistake. Candace Romo helps with a big night of cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Squad announcement is bittersweet as some favorites go home. The team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting. Game Day is when dreams come true!

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented women converge on AT&T Stadium to start the hardest audition process in professional sports, trying out for a coveted spot on the most famous NFL cheerleading squad in the world, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the field narrowed down to 119 women, the pressure is on. They must quickly learn a power pom routine and the famous kickline in order to perform it an hour later before the judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The veterans finally enter the audition process. Now all 83 women are judged head to head during a panel interview, a solo dance performance and on their appearance on the football field as seen and the big screen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: First, the ladies need to have the "classic look" of a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Kelli's hair and make-up transformations are legendary. The ladies are also assessed through a new state of the art fitness test, "Styku".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli media trains the rookie candidates to determine who best represents the DCC at press events. NBC news anchor, Meredith Land tests their on-camera interview skills.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Personality is critical when representing the DCC brand. Kelli takes the women on location to see how they interact during a public appearance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Katy Perry's choreographer, Nick Florez, stops by to offer some performance advice to the ladies. A day that each cheerleader never forgets. The first time they wear the DCC uniform to pose for their cameo photos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad goes on an appearance to support pop music star, Demi Lovato. The ladies learn the entrance to the famed pre-game dance. It's a make or break moment. If a woman can't learn it quickly it might be her last night.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With two suspended vets, the team must re-block their formations for their Hall Of Fame performance. New vets step up as a new point of the triangle is named. The rookie candidates try to get their footing during this never seen before rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 23 veterans travel to Canton, Ohio to perform at Jerry Jones' induction to the Pro Football Hall of Fame. All eyes are watching as the DCC perform for the NFL elite.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp winds down the pressure skyrockets. No one wants to be sent home now. The ladies start to crack under the pressure. Another one is sent home. Will this be the final cut?

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man steals millions of dollars by conning numerous women and businesses over 25 years; one woman brings together a group of his victims to hold him accountable and make him face justice.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a 23-year-old woman goes missing from a shopping mall in Plano, Texas, her family searches for her, and the police seek out who is responsible for her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The mysterious death of a young mother in Ohio and the ensuing investigation that spans years and multiple states.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Two suspects are arrested for the murder of a millionaire 15 years after the crime was committed.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Rock of Love: Video Vixens
programme.desc: With only six girls left in the house, tensions run high as Bret tests the girls' creativity by making them shoot, direct and edit their own music videos.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Going to Ex-tremes
programme.desc: Bret shocks the girls by inviting their exes. He takes the guys out on the town to dig up dirt on the girls.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bitter Suite
programme.desc: Bret surprises the final four with a trip to Las Vegas. One girl's lies cause Bret to question her intentions toward him.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Rockin’ the ‘Rents
programme.desc: Bret wants to know more about the three remaining girls, and what better way to get the 411 than moving their parents into the house!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bret’s Rock of Love
programme.desc: Bret takes his final two girls south of the border to spend some quality, romantic time with each one before making his final choice.

programme.title: Rock of Love: The Reunion
programme.desc: Tonight Bret and all of the girls reunite to rekindle the friendships and rivalries that made the house such a unique place.

programme.title: Rock of Love: The Clip Show
programme.desc: A look back at the outrageous and funny moments that never made the show.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Casting Special
programme.desc: From twins to super freaks, peep the girls vying for Flav's heart.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: In Flav We Trust
programme.desc: Flavor Flav has put his heart on the line three times only to have it handed back to him. But he is willing to give it one final go – swearing he'll find true love or die trying!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Pimp My Gurney
programme.desc: Waking up with 15 girls, Flav quickly presents their first challenge. Flav's looking for a girl that can mend his broken heart.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: Flav asks the remaining 13 girls to create a theme restaurant for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Things That Go Bump On The Lip
programme.desc: Flav splits his ladies up into two teams for the first ever Flavorette Roast Challenge. Each team picks one girl from the other team to put in the hot seat, and they cut loose with a full on verbal beatdown.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Lyin The Witch And The Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for someone who can be a mother as well as a mate, so he has the girls create a bedtime story for a group of children.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Dial M For Mystery Pimp Caller?
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for a woman with the “Total Package.” And now, with only eight women left in his house, he has devised the “Total Package Challenge” to judge who offers the most.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Ancient Voices
programme.desc: A dig hopes to excavate the 2000-year-old tomb of Qin Shihuang, China's First Emperor.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the newfound remains of a dinosaur species considered the biggest carnivore in history, all while posing the question whether they engaged in a fight against the Argentinasaurus.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.desc: Cesar helps the owner of a grooming business deal with difficult canine clients; a Chihuahua has a barking problem.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out. He's also giving his nephew Justin a second chance to rejoin the team.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived, the only question is whom?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen, you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known" addresses.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island, she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits--Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers--the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town, the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.desc: When a blizzard forces the Keatons to spend Christmas at home, Elyse's gift to Steven an album filled with fascinating old photos sparks flashbacks to the births of their three children.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory resents Elyse for the advice she gives her pregnant friend.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse's younger brother and Alex's idol, Ned, makes a surprise visit. However, everyone is puzzled by the go-getter corporate executive's suspicious behavior.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: With the FBI hot on Ned's heels for embezzling 4.5 million dollars in corporate funds, Elyse's ethical brother and Alex's idol tells the family why and where he hid the money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: Soon after freelance architect Elyse Keaton hires her friend Suzanne Davis to handle clerical chores, she wants to fire the under-qualified, overly aggressive secretary.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: In this explosive third installment of the blockbuster martial arts series, when a band of brutal gangsters led by crooked property developer (Mike Tyson) make a play to take over the city, Master Ip is forced to take a stand.

programme.title: Flash Point
programme.desc: The creators of Kill Zone take action to the next level with a breakthrough combination of hard-hitting mixed martial arts battles and nail-biting tension.

programme.title: Kung Fu Killer
programme.desc: Released from prison, a kung-fu expert (Donnie Yen) tries to help the police find a vicious serial killer (Wang Baoqiang) who targets martial-arts masters.

programme.title: Special ID
programme.desc: An undercover cop (Donnie Yen) infiltrates one of China's most ruthless crime syndicates. He must risk everything to protect his family and his life after the boss (Collin Chou) vows to find and kill every traitor in his organization.

programme.title: The Raid: Redemption
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Jakarta's slums lies a drug-gang’s safe house, home to some of the most terrifying and ruthless fighters in the city. Arriving before dawn, an elite swat team moves in to take down the notorious drug lord that runs it.

programme.title: The Raid 2 (Subtitled)
programme.desc: Following immediately after the events of THE RAID, Rama (Iko Uwais) is forced to reinvent himself as an undercover cop in order to provide protection for his wife and child.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. Since she has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, police assume it's a hunting accident — until they find a strange letter, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote campsite.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Scott Dunn goes missing, police spray his bedroom with Luminol and uncover a scene of horrific violence. Now investigators face a daunting task: proving that Scott Dunn had been murdered without a body, a witness or a murder weapon.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate a missing college girl and discover her double life: attending school by day and working as a call-girl by night. Her body is found and investigators find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to replace their old furniture, Lucy gets an allowance of $500 from Ricky. Lucy goes overboard when she shops with their new neighbor Betty Ramsey, spending over three thousand dollars!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although there are perks to living in their new country home, like House & Garden wanting to do a spread on them, the Ricardos find that it is expensive in Connecticut. Lucy decides to raise chickens and sell eggs as a moneymaking sideline.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes, impatient with their egg selling business, decide that they must trade in their 500 chicks for 200 egg laying hens. However, after a couple of weeks, these hens don't yield many eggs at all.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to take part in the fund-raising campaign of the Westport Historical Society and offers to get her husband and his band to perform for their kickoff function. There's only one hitch – Ricky refuses to do it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy dreams of a night in New York City after spending six whole weeks in their new Connecticut home and it turns into a nightmare. Carefully hoarded tickets to a Broadway musical are supposed to take the Ricardos and the Mertzes to see the sold-out show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel is jealous of Lucy's friendship with neighbor Betty Ramsey. Sensitive to this, Lucy decides that the three of them should have a nice lunch together. Although reticent at first, Ethel opens up to Betty upon hearing they are both from Albuquerque.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy must get vacationing Ricky out of her hair so she can do her housework. She and Ethel trick their husbands into building a brick barbecue on the Ricardo patio by first pretending to build it themselves.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes go with their neighbors, Ralph and Betty Ramsey, to the country club dance where a pretty visitor quickly convinces the men they are Romeos in disguise. They are each taken with Diana, the young beautiful cousin of a neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Suburbanite Lucy gets a green thumb and a competitive spirit. She has been raising tulips with a vengeance and wants to dethrone her neighbor Betty Ramsey for "Best Looking Garden" in the local garden club competition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The town of Westport has commissioned a statue of a Minuteman to commemorate the Revolutionary War. The whole town is involved, from Fred who will serve as town crier to Ricky who will make the dedication speech.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: To celebrate the Mertzes' wedding anniversary, Fred and Ricky want to go to a prizefight, but the girls want to get dressed up and go to a nightclub. An argument ensues and Lucy threatens to find two other escorts if their husbands won't take them.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is reading "The Mockingbird Murder Mystery" when Ethel reads her fortune and tells her death is near. Later she overhears a conversation between Ricky and his agent and she jumps to the wrong conclusion that he's trying to do away with her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky cuts off Lucy's allowance and charge accounts because of her careless spending, Lucy finds herself short of funds. Ethel has tickets to a radio quiz show that has a cash prize of $1,000.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: A Mexican drug cartel targets Danny when he intercepts a shipment of several million dollars; Jamie goes after a serial killer who preys on the elderly; Mayor Poole confides in Frank that he plans to retire.

programme.desc: Danny considers retiring until Erin asks for his help with a case involving her ex-husband; Jamie and Eddie pose as a couple; Frank clashes with the new mayor.

programme.desc: Frank is ordered to attend a parade honoring a man who conspired in a bombing against the police; Danny investigates the return of a teen who suspiciously disappeared 13 years ago; Jamie and Eddie try to help a woman they believe is being exploited.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez investigate a case of a detective who was gunned down prior to testifying against a career criminal; Frank personally investigates when Garrett is attacked by a SWAT team outside his home; Erin brings in a confidential informant.

programme.desc: Jamie and Eddie ask Erin to drop old charges against a man who bravely rescued a woman from a local hostage situation; Danny and Baez work a case involving car thieves and discover the leader is a mobster they've dealt with before.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When a journalist disappears while working on an exposé about an innocent man serving time for murder, Danny and Baez hope that re-examining the original case will help them find her.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 20 de agosto de 1980, un francotirador invisible asesinó a dos hombres negros jóvenes mientras trotaban con dos mujeres blancas en Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer en Delaware desapareció en 1996, sus amigos y su familia descubrieron su vida secreta. La secretaria del gobernador había tenido un amorío ilícito con un hombre casado y acaudalado.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En una fría tarde de 1989, la capitana de la Marina Shirley Russel desapareció de Quantico, Virginia. La capitana Russel era una oficial dedicada; sus amigos y colegas estaban seguros de que no se había ausentado sin permiso.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Una persecución termina mal cuando un auto sin conductor choca con un apartamento. Un sospechoso fugaz no logra escaparse de la policía. En un patrullaje rutinario, la policía ve a un niño que se escapó de su casa.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un policía juega al portero cuando atrapa a un ladrón corriendo hacia él. Víctimas de ladrones armados describen con detalle el crimen que se grabó. Oficiales hacen entrega de unos niños llorando a su madre.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: La policía intenta desesperadamente de obtener la cooperación de un hombre desnudo. Después de una persecución, la policía descubre que el conductor es un niño. La policía tiene que lidiar con un problema de drogas y mentiras.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: La policía toma medidas desesperadas contra un sospechoso agresivo. Agentes detienen a un hombre con drogas. La policía sospecha que un conductor nervioso que se rehúsa a ser revisado tiene marihuana en su auto.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un retén se convierte en una carrera todo terreno por un barrio. La policía encuentra un sospechoso fugitivo escondido en el clóset de su pariente. Una pelea domestica estalla por papas fritas y salsa.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Agentes tratan de descifrar si un conductor errático trae un auto robado. Alguien con un cuchillo se queja de sus vecinos que no dejan de fumar marihuana. Los policías encuentran a una persona suicida con una navaja en la garganta.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Una mujer transgénero en silla de ruedas le da su merecido a un agresor. Los oficiales encuentran una pareja semidesnuda mordiéndose. Un conductor imprudente se enfurece rápidamente.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: La policía persigue en la carretera a un sospechoso que huye tras ser detenido. Un sistema de vigilancia en video ayuda a la policía a encontrar un agresor violento por apuñalamiento. La policía rastrea a un sujeto escondido en apartamento ajeno.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Algunas personas se salen con la suya, al menos por un tiempo. Seguros de su éxito, los asesinos en serie matan una y otra vez. Pero cada vez que lo hacen, dejan algunas pistas más y, en última instancia, ellas los llevan a la ruina.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Algunas de las mejores pistas provienen de los lugares menos probables. Los crímenes más difíciles se han resuelto y delincuentes han sido traicionados a través de la evidencia proporcionada por insectos y botellas de cerveza.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Nunca hay una buena razón para matar, pero algunos asesinos son particularmente brutales. Eligen a sus víctimas sin motivo y luego cubren la evidencia con astucia. Aun así, quedan pistas cruciales.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Estos casos tardaron una década o más en resolverse. No hay un estatuto de limitaciones para asesinatos. Cuando el caso se enfría, las pistas se vuelven escasas. Los investigadores deben usar la ciencia para cerrar los casos inconclusos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Desde mayo hasta julio de 1984, Alton Coleman y su pareja de hecho, Denis Brown, se involucraron en una ola de asesinatos que atravesó seis estados y que dejó ocho personas muertas, entre ellos, niños.

programme.desc: Meeting alphas who get by with a little help from their friends; the inescapable gang mentality of mating male dolphins; ant colonies' unique scents; female geladas always get the last word; wolves hunt family-style.

programme.desc: Celebrating small but mighty animal warriors armed with sheaves of scary weapons; admiring nutrias' stink bombs; honey badgers' needlelike choppers; black-tailed gulls' razor-sharp beaks; the killer talons on dive-bombing peregrine falcons.

programme.title: World's Deadliest
programme.desc: Aquatic and terrestrial creatures engage in combat as they dispute borders between land and water; predators learn to hunt in different situations while prey must watch for attacks.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Wildebeest battle for herd hierarchy, meerkats live the thug life, floppy fish fight it out on land and locusts give up their vegetarian ways in a frenzy of cannibalism; it all happens on the wild and wide-open landscape of South Africa.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: The latitudes south of the Sahara offer vastly different battlegrounds for a wide range of warriors; male giraffes swing their heads like wrecking balls, zebras boast the most powerful kick in the animal kingdom, and chimpanzee warfare is familiar.

programme.title: World's Biggest and Baddest Bugs
programme.desc: Get a close-up on creepy-crawlies with a entomologsit.

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: Nature's butchers, living on the wildest side of life, feeding on blood, bone and guts; This eclectic group of creatures is endowed with the ability not only to hunt their victims but even to disembowel them.

programme.title: Ghost Killers
programme.desc: As nocturnal birds of prey, owls count on legendary hunting senses; their ability to hear, see, and fly in the dark makes them exceptional predators with a crucial ecological importance.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: The blonde manes of golden snub-nose monkeys; pink flamingo feathers brought on by an all-crustacean diet; the markings of gemsboks and cheetahs.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: A gorilla wrestling match, pushy moose antlers, long pelican bills that snap at any enemy within range, and a megashark's stereo sniffer.

programme.title: Predators Playbook
programme.desc: The astonishing speed, agility and camouflage of nature's most skilled predators, from wily Komodo dragons to elusive Amazon leaf fish.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #16: Swallowtail Tatoo
programme.desc: A mysterious criminal captures Lupin and Fujiko with a very specific order: in order to save Fujiko's life, Lupin must infiltrate a high-security museum and steal the Bull's Eye jewel. One little problem: the jewel is cursed to kill anyone who steals it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin's new target is the digital currency gained from the transactions made on this site. Lupin sneaks into a massive high-security server facility, known as the "twin towers". Lupin greets the guard to the key, a young girl and skilled hacker "Ami".

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "Hunt down the greatest thief of our times, Lupin III!" The Marco Polo executives have set a trap in the form of the Lupin Game. This has people all over the world tracking down Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Shinpei Mayama, the Rat Clan, Union Mama... the all-stars of assassination, from all over the world, suddenly come after Lupin. They're players in a new game started by the executives of Marco Polo: Happy Deathday.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Fujiko smiles deviously as she points her gun at Lupin, when Zenigata arrives to save him and Ami. They get into the inspector's car which takes off, but it's soon attacked by soldiers who are trying to cash in the price on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot in the head by a drone fighter. With the death of its target, the Lupin Game is concluded. Time passes, and people forget about the game. Released from his duty of hunting Lupin, Ami now lives with Zenigata, when one day Goemon visits her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: The "Smart Safe" has come to the Greater Tokyo Bank. Lupin is goaded by Fujiko and Jigen to try and crack the technological wonder. What can he do against this peculiarly secure safe?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is hired by Gaston to retrieve a painting, and manages to do so easily enough... except the painting has a strange resemblance to a real Picasso piece, forcing Lupin to examine the truth behind why he was hired.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin visits Gaston's grave. There he meets the elderly Camille, with who he goes out for a drink when the pub's phone begins to ring. On the other end of the line is the supposedly dead Gaston.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot, and Albert gets his hands on the notebook. Lupin is saved by Jigen and Goemon and manages to survive his injuries under care. He then explains his past with Albert and how they know each other.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: After learning the shocking truth about Jose's terrifying plot, Lupin heads to Jose's headquarters with Albert, his old thieving comrade. Jigen and Goemon fight off the heaviest opposition while Lupin and Albert head into the heart of the enemy territory.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: To steal the fortune of the Drug King Pablo, the gang heads to South America with Fujiko. As Fujiko distracts the target, Lupin picks off the remains of Pablo's guards while making his way through the jungle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: In a rural town in France, full of cosplayers. Within the town celebrating a pop-cultural event is Goemon. Next to the inn, he decides to keep watch at is Chloé's Bistro. Chloé is exactly the woman Goemon was looking for Lupin's current target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Having enrolled at the Annecy School for Girls, Ami encounters a strange girl in the garden who aims her bow at a crow. The girl is Dolma, the princess of the Kingdom of Padar. Having no friends, Ami finds herself opening up to the odd Dolma.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "Princess Dolma, please save Padar." With that request, Dolma is taken home. Lupin follows shortly, and Ami decides to accompany Fujiko to Padar in order to save Dolma.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is pierced by Dolma's arrow. Ami and Fujiko take Lupin and escape, hiding in a deserted building. The three of them decide to flee, with Lupin badly injured.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Padar sinks into chaos because of the civil war, but things take a sudden turn when the Shake Hands company gets involved. A proclamation by the king is posted online, proving him to be alive.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "I want you to find out who killed my husband." Three years ago, someone shot Count Maupassant to death.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Shortly after moving into the hideout in Riquewihr, Lupin wakes up to a broken bathroom. After bickering with Jigen for access to the bathroom, Fujiko appears.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: A string of indiscriminate shootings has struck Northern Africa. They're actually a challenge to Lupin from the wealthy Zylberstein.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin's gang visits the Northern Angel, on the outskirts of Russia. What at first seems like a snowy, dull town turns out to be full of riches to the joy of the group of thieves.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja compra músculos inflables para verse mejor. / Bob y Patricio derriten una estatua de cera de Calamardo y creen que lo mataron, Calamardo sale del baño y les hace creer que es su fantasma.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja va con Perlita a un baile de su escuela. / Bob Esponja y Calamardo pelean para ver quién es el empleado del mes del Crustáceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo viaja sin querer en una máquina del tiempo. / Bob Esponja y Arenita pelean karate en todos los lugares y Bob debe evitar pelear en el Crustaceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se sale de sus sueños y visita los sueños de sus amigos. / Bob Esponja enferma de peste y Patricio trata de curarlo para evitar que Arenita lo lleve con el Doctor.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky and Iceberg stay up all night on a mission to finish a new ship for the Straw Hats, but the first light of day brings troubling news!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their new ship completed, Luffy and the gang get ready to set sail, but first, they’ll have to steal some underpants in order to secure the services of a shipwright!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A series of flashbacks to his younger days – and some painful persuasion by Robin – help Franky make the difficult decision to leave his friends and go to sea with the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats are ready for their next adventure, but before they can move on they must await the return of Usopp – and avoid a barrage of cannonballs courtesy of Garp!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats’ new ship gets a name, and Franky shows off some of its special features as the gang goes sky high to avoid being sunk by the marines!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace and Blackbeard go toe-to-toe in an epic clash of Devil Fruit powers that pits fire against darkness – and threatens to destroy an entire island!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats discover that their fishermen friends are actually pirates, but Chopper refuses to abandon a very sick patient.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The captain of the Phoenix Pirates loses his will to fight, and the Straw Hats get trapped in a field of icebergs by some figure skating bounty hunters!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and Franky take a spin in the shark sub, Usopp and Sanji have a run in with a flock of deadly penguins, and Puzzle can no longer hide the fact that he's alive!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin is shocked by her encounter with an adorable bounty hunter, Franky and Nami get trapped in a frozen shark, and Luffy's quest to recapture his flag sends him sinking toward the bottom of the sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy battles a set of magnetic twins, Sanji and Usopp fall victim to a pair of figure skating lovebirds, and Zoro has a drink with the man who stole the Straw Hat flag!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin's cola care package helps spring her friends from an icy prison, and Luffy's bold words inspire a battered and beaten pirate to keep fighting!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy continues his battle with the magnetic twins, Chopper uses a rumble ball in his battle with a hockey player – and Robin tries to recover the Straw Hat flag!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The most adorable hero the world has ever known – Chopperman – must battle a hideously evil villain to regain control of his favorite television station!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: An undead warthog sets her sights on Nami, Zorro and Sanji vanish without a trace, Franky and Robin battle an unbeatable army, and Luffy gets captured!

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Seer foresees that the son of Phoebe and Cole will be very powerful, and The Source, who possessed Cole's body, must bring him to the evil side marrying Phoebe in the dark way, i.e., in a cemetery with a dark priest and drinking the bride's blood.
