programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Sons of the Silent Age: Taking a Huck Finn styled trip down a local river, the turtles, Casey and April discover a nuclear power plant … as well as mermen of Y'Lantias … the last of their kind.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Dragon's Brew: Hun's taking the Purple Dragons to new heights. He hijacks a top-secret government shipment…one of Bishop's little surprises.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: I, Monster: On a training exercise in an abandoned brickworks in the boroughs, Casey Jones and our four turtles run afoul of a strange "man." This is the Rat King… and even though they don't know it, the turtles have met him before.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Grudge Match: Mikey's blowing off trainings more than ever; he's the BattleNexus Champion, after all! Who needs training?

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Wing and a Prayer: It's a bird! It's a plane! Okay, it's this guy with angel wings, an Avian, named Raptarr who is after this other guy with metal wings, named Mephos, who wants to take over the Avians' flying city.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Bad Day: Everything goes from bad to worse for the turtles. Life spins out of control in a nightmare of horror and pain. Who is behind all this? How will it ever end? P.S. Your cat is …

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Aliens Among Us: It looks as if Agent Bishop might find himself out of a job or at least out of funding. With the President in New York City, the turtles are out watching the motorcade when they find themselves right in the middle a new alien invasion!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Dragons Rising: Hun wasn't kidding. The Purple Dragons really are going places. They're fast becoming a world-class crime organization. But, Casey's still got a score to settle with Hun … big crime syndicate or no.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Still Nobody: A gang of young toughs, filling the void left by the rising Purple Dragons, is out to bash an old man to keep him from testifying against them.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: All Hallows Thieves: It's Halloween and all the freaks are out … especially the King of Thieves. He manages to bring to life an old idol, which wreaks havoc upon the town with its legions of gremlins.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Samurai Tourist: Usagi and Gen come to New York for a visit with the turtles. Gen gets a little carried away by the bright lights and the big city and goes wandering off on his own. Bishop hears of another possible "alien" presence.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Ancient One: It is time for Leonardo to move on. Splinter sends Leo to a new sensei … or rather, a very old sensei. The journey is long and perilous. Can Leonardo look into himself and find the right answers to his questions?

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Scion of the Shredder: Hades hath no wrath like a scion scorned. Karai strikes with a vengeance. She physically invades the ultimate sanctuary! The lair! She crushes the turtles' home and nearly crushes the turtles scattering them across town.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Prodigal Son: Leonardo returns from his lessons with the Master Sage to find the lair destroyed and his family scattered across town … all by the hand of Karai.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Outbreak: Something is growing and spreading in the sewers and the waterways. The remnants of Bishop's 'aliens' have infected various animals, mutating them into horrible beasts ravenous for anything that gets in their way… including turtles.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Trouble With Augie: April receives a message from her long, lost Uncle Augie … who's trapped in another dimension.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Insane in the Membrane: Stockman has finally reclaimed his humanity by cloning a body for himself. Now, he is human once more … until his body starts to deteriorate and the changes undermine his sanity.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Return of Savanti Romero: Part 1: Evil demon sorcerer Savanti Romero is back! Back in time, that is - he's stuck in the Jurassic period but is causing trouble for the Turtles in the present day.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Return of Savanti Romero: Part 2: Evil demon sorcerer Savanti Romero has lured the Turtles back to the Jurassic period to exact his revenge, as well as get his hands on the Time Sceptre.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Tale of Master Yoshi: Resting and recuperating in a new lair where there's no electricity and hence no TV and no electronic entertainment, the Turtles resort to the ancient cure for boredom: storytelling.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Adventures in Turtle-Sitting: Casey and April prepare for a romantic evening out on the town, but their would-be date is dashed when the Turtles drop in with a very ill Donatello.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Good Genes Part I: Donatello is sick … mutated into a huge monster actually. Our heroes only hope is to sneak into Bishop's laboratory and acquire some sort of cure for Donatello.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Good Genes Part II: The turtles have made a deal with the devil … a.k.a. Agent Bishop. In return for curing Donatello, his three brothers have agreed to retrieve a pendant that is supposed to aid Bishop in his genetics work.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Ninja Tribunal: The turtles find themselves abducted..not by aliens…but by ninjas. There's a new force on the scene. Actually, it's an ancient force. The turtles have found themselves caught up in a seemingly endless battle between good and evil.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Beginning of the End: Returning to the Tribunal Monastery with the second Shredder Artifact, things seem to be going well for our heroes when—Deception! The Foot Mystics infiltrate the Monastery and pose as members of the tribunal.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Lap of Gods: Abducted by the Ninja Tribunal and separated from Master Splinter, the Turtles and the human Acolytes are taken to Japan to begin their training. And they're going to need it because the ancient evil is on its way.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Demons and Dragons: The Turtles begin training with the mysterious Ninja Tribunal, experimenting with new powers and weapons despite Splinter's reservations, not to mention his portentous dreams of their demise!

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: When Captain Huddleston hears that the marine corporal has been charged with rape, he sends Lt. Colonel Sarah Mac MacKenzie to handle the case in a hot zone of Anti-American activity.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: An intruder shoots three Navy people, killing two. One of the dead is a friend of Harm, who protects his reputation. Webb, counter-espionage, and disinformation are involved; Bud solves it. Mac and Renee return to town; Mac leaves again.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Capt. Shepard leads his troop off its peacekeeping mission and into battle with the colonel of the rebel forces. Consequently, six marines die in the public incident. Harm is sent in to investigate despite a recent touch of bad luck in a string of trials.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The JAG gang takes part in a JAGathon, a charity-benefit marathon, which provides opportunities for personal pride and individual competitiveness. Sturgis feels uncertain, and Harm defends a sailor for impersonating an officer.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A mild-mannered Sparta businessman shoots his wife and her lover and then flees with his daughter, holding her hostage in the family cabin out in the woods. The Sparta police must move with caution in fear he may shoot his daughter and then himself.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: After $100,000 goes missing from the bank where he works, Daryl Tyler, a friend of Bubba's, is framed for theft and kills himself. Only his young son knows the truth that could clear his late father's name; however, for now, he won't say a word.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Althea Tibbs finds Lydia Crane, an elderly resident of a local nursing home, wandering along the railroad tracks in the early morning hours. Ms. Crane informs Chief Gillespie that a murder has taken place at the home, and she fears she is next.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When Sgt. Lonnie Jamison picks up Jana Craven and her friends for cutting school, a simple truancy bust turns into a complicated murder case for the Sparta police involving the disappearance of Jana's mother, Colleen, and her abusive father, Frank.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Someone mysteriously leaves a baby on Lieutenant Bubba Skinner's doorstep. When the Sparta police search for the mother, they uncover a car submerged in a lake and the dead body of the baby's mother inside, but who and where is the baby's father?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A conservative minister is murdered while trying to close down a traveling bordello operating near his church, but a surprising side of the man is revealed when the Sparta police investigate his death and, later, his wife's. Diane Ladd guest stars.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: While hiking in the Colorado mountains, Alex is kidnapped by a trio of mountain men, who force her to their backwoods cabin. Walker, Trivette, Sandoval, and Malloy follow their trail through the mountains, determined to get her back.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A former member of the IRA brings his daughter to Dallas for medical treatment. However, Irish radicals follow them to Texas to kidnap the girl and force the father to help. The Rangers must find the girl before she dies from her illness.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: To celebrate Walker's birthday, CD gives a book on the early life of Hayes Cooper. CD relates the adventure of the legendary Ranger protecting a wagon train from outlaws.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Country singer Lila McCann stars as Kelly Wyman, an aspiring country singer. One of the many obstacles this precocious teenager faces is a slick-talking talent agent, who is the mastermind behind a drug cartel that Walker is trying to bring down.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: "Skates", Harm's RIO when he was aboard the USS Patrick Henry, was the Landing Safety Officer in charge of the deck when a Tomcat crashes while making an emergency landing.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Harm and Mac agree to help guide young student "attorneys" at Iron Forge Naval Academy, a prep school for the US Naval Academy, as they conduct a mock trial.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Hostilities between Harm and Brumby escalate both in and out of the courtroom and it takes Chegwidden, with Brumby's CO's approval to get them to deal with their anger

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Gunny is charged with gay-bashing following an off duty altercation outside a gay bar.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Harm and Mac board a plane bound for Korea to investigate charges that GI's shot and killed civilians during the Korean War.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Mac is prosecuting a SEAL jumpmaster charged with causing the death of one of his men during a parachute insertion exercise.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Medal of Honor Navy SEAL Lt. Curtis Rivers is court-martialed for punching a Congressional candidate who claims to be a Navy SEAL.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A salvage company tries to claim rights to the wreckage of the USS Dolphin, a WW2 submarine that was lost the day before the attack on Pearl Harbor in 1941.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A few days before his promotion to the command of the Sixth Fleet, RAdm Boone, an old acquaintance of Harmon Rabb, Sr.reminisces with Cmdr Harmon Harm Rabb, Jr. about the Vietnam war. Their conversation is interrupted by SECNAV who bears shocking news.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Louis Cellucci is having a rough time aboard the flight deck of the USS Benjamin Harrison. Moments after he walks away from another failed attempt at fixing an F-14, shouts of Man Overboard! are heard across the deck.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Louis Cellucci is having a rough time aboard the flight deck of the USS Benjamin Harrison. Moments after he walks away from another failed attempt at fixing an F-14, shouts of Man Overboard! are heard across the deck.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Congresswoman Latham and a colleague watch four marine jumpers jump into the ocean from an M22 Osprey. With two marines left to jump, the plane is struck by a swell in the ocean. Harm and Mac are instructed to investigate.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Late one evening, Harm receives a message from his ex-girlfriend. Harm returns the call and is devastated to find out that Parker is dead. Eager to help, Harm immediately makes plans to meet with Agent Kenworthy who will be leading the NCIS investigation.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: When Captain Huddleston hears that the marine corporal has been charged with rape, he sends Lt. Colonel Sarah Mac MacKenzie to handle the case in a hot zone of Anti-American activity.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: Christine comes into some money and must decide whether to splurge on a designer dress or help starving children. ED BEGLEY JR. guest stars as Pastor Ed.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Jealousy gets the best of Sabrina when Harvey starts spending a lot of time with his best friend.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda experience a life-changing event when they discover they are adopted.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: New charge card from the Other Realm causes Sabrina to forget that the most important things in life can’t be bought.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: It’s Halloween, and Sabrina is having a ghoulish time adjusting to her new job at the coffee house.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) meets a foreign lingerie model who doesn't speak English and Stuart (David Alan Basche) has to act as interpreter. Eden helps Holly overcome a bad first impression with a handsome neighbor. Haskell buys a coffin as an investment.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison), Stuart (David Alan Basche), and Haskell (Wayne Knight) are forced to trade apartments with Holly (Kristen Johnston) when her mother (Judith Light) comes for a visit because Holly never told her mother her engagement ended months ago.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly (Kristen Johnston) has to face her cheating ex fiancé for the first time since they broke up, she enlists the guys' help to prove to him he lost the best thing he ever had.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang's relationships are thrown out of whack when Holly discovers there's way more to Stuart than meets the eye.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris' excitement about graduating from junior high school is ruined when Greg announces that he'll be going to a different high school in the fall.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: As a first-time high school student, Chris is really looking forward to attending a school with some diversity.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris agrees to help a classmate, Angel improve his grades if Angel will help him get the attention of Chris' latest crush, Maria. Rochelle reluctantly befriends an ex-con, Peaches who has moved back into the neighborhood, but her good deed backfires.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Valeria y Belinda se van de viaje, Pablo, ante la insistencia de su hija accede a acompañarlas, mientras Francisco planifica una visita sorpresa. Marcia decide usar al inspector Sánchez.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Francisco llega al hotel buscando a Valeria y se lleva una desagradable sorpresa, se niega a escuchar razones. El mal comportamiento de Belinda durante el viaje mantiene preocupada a su madre.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Creyendo que Valeria y Pablo están juntos, Francisco se plantea la posibilidad de casarse con Paula. Belinda le pide a Pablo que la reconozca legalmente y Marcia se deshace del inspector.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia niega que Alejandro sea hijo de Aníbal Villegas. David escucha toda la conversación. Verónica le dice a Julio que tiene pruebas contra él. Alejandro le reclama a Antonia el haber acabado con su vida; para él es la peor madre que pudo tener.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le regresa el niño a Lucecita. Alejandro va a la tumba de Gabriela y Verónica lo escucha decir cuánto todavía la extraña y la ama. Ella siente nostalgia. Antonia está tensa y ordena la muerte de Julio, que ya sabe que Gabriela está viva.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Julio repite el nombre de Gabriela Suárez mientras agoniza, pero no alcanza a decir que ella es Verónica Dantés. Antonia se va quedando cada vez más sola y Poncia se lo hace notar. Alejandro sabe que su mamá no siente nada por la muerte de Montemar.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica no quiere que Alejandro se vaya del pueblo. Él aprovecha la oportunidad para repetirle que la ama. En una misión especial a San Pedro, el comisionado Balmaceda tiene su primer enfrentamiento con Antonia. Ricardo trata su problema de impotencia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Teams travel to Switzerland where they free-fall over 400 feet into the Gletscherschlucht Glacier Gorge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While in Switzerland, teams are surprised with the first ever public U-turn vote, where racers have to vote in front of each other.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams take a bumpy ride in Split, Croatia and try not to get tongue-twisted reciting poetry while in motion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams try not to crack while transporting eggs across town by bicycle in the Netherlands.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million on the line, the final four teams race through London. The team to cross the finish line first will be crowned the winners!

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: "The Amazing Race" celebrates travelling one million miles around the world when the 32nd race kicks off from Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Bogotá, Colombia, where they encounter the "Yield," which gives them the power to stop another team's race for a designated amount of time.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are in Manaus, Brazil, where they have big decisions to make when they encounter the first U-turn of the race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Asunción, Paraguay, where they must either stack a pyramid of watermelons or perform a traditional Paraguayan bottle dance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams in Paris, France, must whip up some tasty treats and make enough Chantilly cream for four pies, as well as compete in a series of carnival games.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams reach new heights in Berlin, as they walk face-first down the exterior of a building for nearly 200 feet.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Almaty, Kazakhstan, where they brave the cold weather while perfecting a choreographed fight scene and decorate a yurt.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Hyderabad, India, where they must complete double the detours, double the road blocks and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policeman try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: When baby Mo gets sick, Morgan successfully pleads for entry into Strand's Tower; Morgan quickly learns even Strand's benevolence has its limits.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alicia enlists Morgan's help to search for a new home for her people, but Morgan soon learns the search is more complicated than he imagined.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alicia takes refuge in the home of a mysterious stranger; with her fevers growing worse and Arno pursuing her at every turn, Alicia is forced to confront the failings of her past and how she will face her future.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: When Charlie shows up at the Tower unexpectedly, Howard recruits a young ranger in training to determine the reason for her visit; as they journey beyond the Tower together, Charlie's true motives are revealed.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Luciana and Wes test the limits of their patience when Daniel's worsening mental state ends up endangering them all.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: When baby Mo goes missing inside the Tower, Dorie Sr. finds himself in a unique position to prove his worth to an increasingly paranoid Strand.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan and Alicia plan their next steps; Dwight and Sherry face the prospect of having to choose between their code and their safety.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the battle for the Tower heats up, Alicia brings the fight to Strand's front door.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the survivors prepare to escape the area by raft, Alicia turns back to save one more person trapped in the fallout.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan finds a new ally who turns out to be more trouble than he bargained for.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Two separate groups leave Alexandria for supplies, and while both worry over the future of the community, they will face immediate danger.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When someone goes missing in Alexandria, the community goes on alert, and search parties venture out.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: To save one of their own, Rick's group must venture outside the walls; their experience changes their lives forever.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the members of the group remain helpless, Negan takes action that will forever haunt those who survive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: For a number of familiar faces, a new, well-established community seems too good to be true.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los seguidores de Beta se acercan a las puertas, y parte del grupo se impregna de sangre de zombi para intentar escapar entre la multitud de caminantes y regresar con ayuda. Sin embargo, los susurradores se mueven con cuchillos entre los zombis.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie regresa, para consternación de Negan. Los desafíos que superó desde su partida han hecho que se vuelva difícil sobrevivir para ella y su hijo. Por otro lado, Daryl y Maggie luchan inesperadamente contra una amenaza invisible y desconocida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol encuentran una vieja cabaña que provoca que Daryl recuerde sus años alejado del grupo después de que Rick desapareció. Además, revive el doloroso recuerdo de encontrarse con un sobreviviente y los eventos tóxicos con Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Gabriel y Aaron buscan comida y suministros para llevarlos de regreso a Alexandria, utilizando el mapa de Maggie. En su búsqueda de una ubicación más, encuentran un escondite, pero la fe se rompe y el optimismo se resquebraja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko y Princess son capturados y separados por los misteriosos soldados que los rodeaban en la estación ferroviaria. Princess lucha con los recuerdos de su traumático pasado y planea escapar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol toman caminos separados. Ella regresa a Alexandria, mientras él se adentra en los bosques. A partir de este momento, cado uno deberá usar sus habilidades de supervivencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie vuelve a Alexandria mientras Carol lleva a Negan a un viaje para minimizar la tensión en aumento. Negan reflexiona sobre su difunta esposa Lucille.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl lidera un equipo de misión para buscar en la base militar que descubrió. Por su parte, Maggie cuenta su historia, lo que impulsa una nueva misión de supervivencia que solo Negan puede liderar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La misión de Maggie lleva al equipo a través de un túnel del metro plagado de zombis y con el problema añadido de Negan. En el grupo de Eugene, Yumiko busca respuestas acerca de su hermano.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Reapers aprovechan que el equipo de la misión de Maggie se ha separado para atacarlos. Carol, Rosita, Magna y Kelly intentan capturar caballos para llevarlos a Alexandria. Judith, RJ, Hershel y Gracie asimilan que sus padres están lejos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Dog son capturados por los Reapers. Luego son llevados al Meridiano y se vuelven a conectar con una figura familiar de su pasado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron, Carol, Lydia y Jerry van a las ruinas de Hilltop en busca de herramientas. El grupo de Eugene se somete a la orientación del Commonwealth. Maggie y Negan atraviesan el bosque. Judith y el resto de niños se enfrentan a los adolescentes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Connie y Virgil se esconden en una casa ocupada por misteriosas criaturas, en su afan de escaparse de los caminantes. Pope pone a prueba la lealtad de Daryl hacia los Reapers con una misión controvertida. Kelly deja Alexandria para buscar a Connie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie y Elijah aprenden nuevas tácticas de supervivencia de Negan. El grupo de Eugene quitan a los caminantes para pagar sus multas. Yumiko hace una entrevista para un trabajo importante. Daryl descubre más sobre Leah.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Reapers defienden Meridian del asalto de una horda de zombis. Pope cree que Maggie es la responsable del ataque, y los habitantes de Alexandria tratan de proteger las defensas de la ciudad, destrozadas por una violenta tormenta.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Maggie, Gabriel, Negan y Elijah luchan contra los Segadores por comida. Aaron debe sobrevivir a una tormenta.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James West is tried by a court of cutthroats who believe he has murdered his friend and fellow agent, Artemus Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon tangle with an ex-confederate colonel who possesses the power to control the fourth dimension.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are assigned to guard a member of an investment group set up so the surviving member will gain all the assets.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon encounter an old adversary who has found the secret of turning objects into gold.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are assigned to escort the Sultan of Ramapurand his sacred white elephant, a gift to President Grant.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon become involved in a bizarre Siberian prisoner exchange in Vladivostok without leaving the United States.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon encounter a society lady who plans to change the U.S.A. into a monarchy and reign as its queen.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The receipt of a newspaper that predicts the death, in their presence, of a famed magician, puzzles agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon investigate the murder of a scientist who had been studying a rash of destructive tidal waves.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon Again tangle with pint-sized Dr. Loveless, who has another king-sized plan to achieve world conquest.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon fear an attempt on President Grant's life while they are escorting him to a San Francisco conference.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Artemus Gordon are summoned to a meeting of Navy officers, only to discover that they have all been murdered.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A master criminal determines to implant a device in President Grant's brain that will make him respond to the criminal's orders.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon get involved with a Croatian king and a werewolf-type who plots to control the King's country.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin meets a lumberjack. Tommy watches how pipes are disguised, and Richard seeks out places for HVAC equipment. Kevin learns about Single Houses. A crepe myrtle gets pruned and Tommy talks termites.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Richard works on plumbing at the Elliotborough house while Kevin meets a kitchen designer. The porch gets assessed. A floor goes down at the single house. Tommy and Mark snake wires through a wall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old piazza columns get restored. The iron gate is made by blacksmith students at a local college. Lights are selected for an old house. New siding mixes with old to meet historic district codes.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Charleston boasts a colorful housing stock. Judith decides on a siding color for the Elliotborough project. Kevin meets her and a design expert in a neighborhood famous for house colors, Rainbow Row.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The pergola goes up. Ross looks at smart home technology. A local craftsman puts the finishing touches on a dining table. Richard checks out the HVAC plan while repointing starts on the fireplaces.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The iron gate is fitted at the Charleston Single House. Kevin, Tom, and Richard tour the renovations. Richard visits the Elliotborough project for updates. The completion of the project is celebrated.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A year after California’s worst wildfire, the people of Paradise are still clearing the devastation. About 90% of the homes were lost. Kevin, Tom, and Richard meet families determined to rebuild.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The homeowner fabricates a stone hearth. Richard learns about automatic sprinkler systems. Kevin sees a simulator that shows how the Camp Fire spread. Tom inspects a vent designed to resist embers.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Luke and Crystal move in. Kevin visits a fire test lab. Jose and Anna’s house gets roof shingles. Mark installs a stone veneer. Kevin tours farms. Jenn meets an architect who designed a town memorial.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Paradise residents discuss rebuilding. Tom inspects engineered siding. Richard looks at a backup battery. A former fire chief discusses preparation. At the Memorial, heroes and survivors are honored.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Homeowners put the history back into their 1890s Shingle-style home. They’ll restore the home’s original beauty and update it for modern living.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Kevin start to lay subfloor in the dining room. Charlie explains drilling granite for the new garage and driveway. Kevin tours Cape Ann then joins Tommy to move an interior doorway.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Charlie create a cathedral ceiling. Mark breaks through the foundation to make space for mechanicals. Kevin learns about sun tunnels and Richard creates a plan for cooling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Mark McCullough matches new stone to the old on the porch. Heath buries electrical underground. Kevin, Molly and kitchen designer Michele look for design inspiration. Tommy creates a barrel ceiling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Rounded-top windows are installed. Easy-install roof shingles go down. Roger takes Kevin fishing. Tommy adds a diamond shingle siding detail. Radiant heat goes in somewhere unexpected: the ceiling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy repairs 130-year-old pocket doors. A new type of solar goes in. Jenn works with landscaper Fred to build a boulder wall. Richard gives a lesson on the modern furnace. Father Mark and son Erik Ferrante showcase the art of mosaic tile installation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Original leaded glass windows are repaired. Jenn and Fred plant a bed of perennials along the new driveway. Mini splits solve a ductwork problem. Homeowner Molly and her designer Shelby make design decisions. Tommy tackles tricky original trim.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Richard learns about the invention of the Stillson wrench. Mauro repairs old plaster. Norm repairs broken balusters. Heath installs a new panel. Venetian plaster goes on the dining room ceiling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A brass handrail is created. Mauro paints a chalkboard finish. Repaired balusters get reinstalled. Richard gives a lesson in make-up air. Work begins on a custom table. Heath talks smart electricity.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work is complete on the Cape Ann Shingle Style project. The team tours the finished home, celebrating all of the repaired historic details and the new elements that keep with its original style.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: We take a tour of some of the past This Old House project kitchens. Follow the evolution of appliances from white to stainless as well as cabinet finishes from natural to painted.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: From large scale industry to small town makers, these factories provide the materials for our projects.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: From young blacksmiths metalworking to a woodworker who finds centuries-old lumber under water, This Old House features talented makers all over the country who make beautiful household items.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: From demo day to design, we follow every step as the homeowners decide on the components and the crew converts a decades-old butler's pantry kitchen into an up-to-date kitchen for the future.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The guys begin restoration of an 1887 Queen Anne Victorian Cottage. Kevin hears about preserving historic details while updating the interior space and creating a new garage and master suite.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Decorative Queen Anne style barge rafters are reproduced for the garage addition. The antique windows get restored and primed in the shop, re-glazed, and then returned to the house for installation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Bricks are cleaned and repurposed for a new chimney. Staggered shingles are reapplied. Kevin O'Connor learns about glass orbs hidden on Block Island. Richard Trethewey shows a new shower drain.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet invites an attractive man to the apartment, expecting that they will be alone, but to her surprise, she finds Jack and Chrissy in the bedroom.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy accidentally eats the pie that Jack was entering in a statewide baking competition and then tries to substitute a ringer from the bakery.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: While Stanley Roper is selling the apartment building as a wedding anniversary surprise, his wife catches him with the attractive real estate agent and believes her marriage is breaking up.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack, Janet, and Chrissy's landlord, Stanley Roper, sells the apartment building but resists his wife Helen's desire to move into a new townhouse in a "swinging" development next door to a snobbish realtor who thinks they will lower the community's tone.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack angrily leaves and becomes a live-in cook for Larry's boss and his passionate wife. Guest Star(s): John Larroquette

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Using Janet and Chrissy as allies, Jack pretends he lives alone when he falls for a girl he thinks is "old-fashioned."

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack Tripper, a chef for all seasons, turns out to be quite a dish himself when he disguises himself as roommate Chrissy to skirt FBI agents on his trail.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Stanley Roper invites his former tenants, Jack, Janet, and Chrissy to a surprise disco party he is planning for his wife, Helen, and asks the two girls to give him secret lessons to prepare for the event.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy finds out that Jack has become a male escort and is running around with an older woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When the roommates meet their new landlord they discover they have accidentally sold all his furniture, thinking it was the Ropers!

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy gets a new job selling cosmetics door-to-door, and unexpectedly finds herself in Ralph Furley's winner-take-all strip poker game.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: It's no more "Mr. Nice Guy" after Jack learns how to get his way with Chrissy and Janet.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio's outrageous escapades result in an eviction notice from Furley and they get ready to move into a luxurious rent-free penthouse.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: 75-year-young veteran actor J.Pat O'Malley takes a lesson from the "youngsters" by forming his own "oldster-trio" in a geriatric apartment commune.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns. If that's not bad enough, Bakura's Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi's Life Points every time Yugi attacks. Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi's trapped.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon is about to unleash the final blow to win the duel, but Bakura may not survive the blast from the almighty Egyptian God Monster. Will Yugi attack and advance in the finals or will he surrender to save Bakura's life?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of the Egyptian God Cards is finally revealed. The mysterious Shadi takes Yugi on a journey back in time to the creation of Duel Monsters… and the dangerous powers it released.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the second duel of the Battle City finals, Odion, disguised as Marik, befuddles Joey with numerous traps to bring the duel to a stalemate. However, Joey has Giant Trunade, the perfect counter to Odion's strategy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion's Embodiments of Apophis run roughshod over Joey's monsters and his Life Points. Can Joey effectively utilize the monsters he won earlier in the tournament, or is he too flustered to mount a successful counterattack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a feeding frenzy as Odion's Mystical Beast Selket devours Joey's monsters to morph into greater and powerful stages of evolution! How can Joey defeat Selket when it ingests Joey's monsters whenever they're summoned on to the field?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion uses a phony Egyptian God Card to summon the third Egyptian God Monster, The Winged Dragon of Ra, targeted to annihilate the rest of Joey's Life Points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The third duel of the Battle City finals between Mai and Marik is no ordinary duel; it's a battle in the dreaded Shadow Realm where losing Life Points equals losing your memories.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Mai loses more memories under Marik's relentless assault, she loses confidence in her dueling abilities. Will Yugi and friends' never-ending support bring her back to victory, or will her shattered mind be trapped in the Shadow Realm for eternity?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai gains control of Marik's The Winged Dragon of Ra, but she's unable to decipher how to unleash its massively powerful abilities. Can Mai solve the mystery of the Egyptian God Card before Marik solves it himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the fourth duel of the Battle City finals, Kaiba's mystery opponent is Ishizu. With the power of her Millennium Necklace, Ishizu can see the future, including every card Kaiba is planning to play.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Ishizu, using the magic of her Millennium Necklace, has already seen the outcome of the duel: she will defeat Kaiba with sacrifice's blast! How can Kaiba win when it's predestined that he will lose? Kaiba must change the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Marik's evil grows, Ishizu reveals the secrets of her bloodline: How did Marik transform from a kind child into a power-hungry tyrant out for world domination? Can Yugi save Marik from the edge of darkness, or is he already beyond salvation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and Millennium Ring, with the loser being trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever. To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally… another Marik?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm. But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's blimp is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen - five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba's past who are out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley's Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Yugi struggles to make heads or tails of the Deck Master System, Big 1 uses his Deck Master ability to send all of Yugi's attacks right back! How can Yugi defeat an opponent when his attacks take away his own life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's running out of life points, but can his cute little Deck Master Kuriboh unleash his furry fury to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Prepare for a feathered fight when Téa squares off against Big 2 Crump's Nightmare Penguin where the loser will be trapped forever in a block of ice!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa's body turns more and more into a giant popsicle, can she keep her brain from freezing to find a way to melt Big 2's strategy? Or will Big 2's penguin horde waddle all over her?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the judicial jerk Big 3 Johnson who takes the Deck Master form of Judge Man! How can Joey defeat a foe who can destroy Joey's monsters at will?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Just when Joey seems to gain the upper hand, he hits the longest streak of bad luck in the history of mankind! Has Joey's fortunes finally run out, or is a crooked judge ignoring the rules of the law?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 4 Nezbitt challenges Duke, Tristan, and Serenity for the right to gain control of three bodies at once! Will Serenity's errors cost her team the ultimate price when Tristan and Duke can't cover for her mistakes?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: One down, two to go! With the loss of Tristan, Serenity is heartbroken. Can she pull herself together and remember the lessons Tristan taught her to turn the duel around?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tristan's back... but he's not who he appears to be when he kidnaps Mokuba! It's time for Kaiba to stop monkeying around and rescue his brother, but he's confronted by Big 5 Leichter!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 5's Satellite Cannon attacks Kaiba's monsters from deep space! Mokuba's unwavering faith in Kaiba inspires him to believe that his brother will pull out the victory, but Noah has plans to ruin their brotherhood...
